title: Amazon Posts $181.5 Billion in Revenue and Smashes Wall Street’s Q1 Earnings Expectations
summary: Amazon reported its latest quarterly earnings results Wednesday, revealing sales at its cloud business, Amazon Web Services (AWS), were up 28% year over year to $37.6 billion from January to March. Wall Street forecast earnings per share (EPS) of $1.65 on $177.2 billion in revenue, according to ana…
